reviews.review_description: Can you add gear VR controller support?

developer_response.body: No sorry, the game requires too many buttons and axis controls.

reviews.review_description: I've played the demo after loads of brilliant vr games but Dammmmn. Ive just paid for the full game  and can't wait for it to load. So cheap as well at just below 3 quid. Move over Tim Peakes the force is with me. Buy it, multi player it and I'll see you there. Well done chaps in creating such a game on this platform........
Very good game lots of missions and multiplayer... controls felt responsive.. I liked the docking after each  level�

Looking at the reviews I really wanted to give this game a go. Looks awesome! I purchased it and found out I can't move it to my sd card. That's a deal breaker for me. I'll be requesting a refund. Hopefully you guys can eventually allow external storage. When you do, I'll gladly purchase.
I'm only made it TO practice, I've only played once, and I didn't even get through, yet! Practice!
It might not be as pretty as End Space, but it's at least as fun, possibly even a little more. It's certainly more challenging. I really like the missions on this. Gimme more please.......
seemless and well made. I love it.

reviews.review_title: A full space sim in VR!
reviews.review_description: Try the demo and get ready to happily purchase the full game. This is one to show the uninitiated how amazing VR is!
This game seems a lot more robust than other space shooters, and a lot more challenging. I'm excited to get further in the campaign. So far I can't beat the second level!
I downloaded this without realizing that I can’t use the oculus go controller. So I’ll be deleting it and am requesting a refund. Thanks in advance.
